patch.value: GH-244: surface provider/vector-store resolution source in pm health

Auto-detected search provider / vector adapter leave settings.search.provider and vector_store.adapter as empty strings, so config audits falsely report 'not configured' while runtime works. Surface provider_source/vector_store_source (auto-detected vs configured) + the persisted configured value in pm health vectorization details so the two sources of truth are self-explanatory.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: GH-244 fix: pm health vectorization details now surface provider_source/vector_store_source (configured|auto-detected|unconfigured) plus the persisted provider_configured/vector_store_configured strings, so a config audit can tell auto-detect apart from genuine misconfiguration when settings.search.provider/vector_store.adapter are empty. New pure helper resolveProviderConfigSource in core/search/providers.ts. Files: cli/commands/health.ts, core/search/providers.ts.

patch.value: health explains auto-detected vs misconfigured providers
pm health now surfaces provider/vector-store resolution source + persisted configured value so empty-but-auto-detected config is no longer a false audit gap.
